evidence_summary: Using weight normalization can help to self-stabilize the norm of the gradients, making optimization more robust to the value of the learning rate.
Batch Normalization can help to reduce internal covariate shift, which can cause unstable gradients and loss divergence.
Increasing the learning rate with Batch Normalization can lead to a training speedup without ill side effects.
Removing Dropout and reducing L2 weight regularization can also help to improve training speed and reduce overfitting with Batch Normalization.
